subject: BLOCKER: WS1.4 test classification
body:
Coordinator directive from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

Rawls/test-expert returned BLOCKING / NO GO on WS1.4: packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/processor.unit.test.ts is integration-shaped, not a unit suite. It imports DatasetCore/DataFactory product code, exercises the real jsonld runtime via createJsonLdProcessor(), and has non-trivial framed JSON-LD to quads helper logic before assertions.

Please hold commit-window activity and fix the classification: rename/split to an integration-shaped test, or keep a true unit suite only around a pure adapter boundary with simple literals. After the fix, rerun pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test, type-check, lint, and build, then report readiness again.

Type and assumptions reviews are still pending. No staging until all blockers are resolved and I route the commit queue window.
